message:
fix(showcase): update tests for mouse capture toggle (bd-iuvb.17.1)

Update palette action count assertions from +6 to +7 to account for the
new toggle_mouse_capture command palette action. Fix mouse_tab_click test
to use Down+Up sequence matching updated handler. Update help overlay test
to expect "m / F6" key label.
